acceptance_targets: [chapter_03_prose_001] PASS if a reread of the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:53, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:125, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:167, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:243, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:267, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:281, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:303, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:373, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:477, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:493 finds no more than two turn-marking sentences still using the repeated "That was ..." or "It did not ..." formula, and each revised beat is legible through a different concrete cue on the page. FAIL if three or more of those passages still rely on the same formulaic emphasis.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if a reread of the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:53, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:125, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:167, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:243, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:267, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:281, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:303, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:373, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:477, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:493 finds no more than two turn-marking sentences still using the repeated "That was ..." or "It did not ..." formula, and each revised beat is legible through a different concrete cue on the page. FAIL if three or more of those passages still rely on the same formulaic emphasis.
findings.problem: The narration keeps landing emotional and structural turns with the same summative stamp ("That was ...") and companion negation-led emphasis elsewhere in the chapter. By the time the gate opens and Tovin blesses Riva by indirection, the repeated sentence shape reads as a reusable prose formula rather than a fresh pressure-specific cadence.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the turn-marking beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:167, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:267, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:281, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:303, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:373, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:493, and vary the nearby negation beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:53, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:125, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:243, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:477. Keep the same story information, but make at least four of those turns land through distinct physical consequence, image, or free-indirect thought instead of another "That was ..." or "It did not ..." construction.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the collision of sanctity, lust, labor, rot, and family resentment. In edge cases, choose the more concrete, uncomfortable, and character-specific rendering over symbolic safety; if an image or action feels too polite for the pressure, it is probably wrong.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, violence, shame, grief, or economic pressure drives a scene, vague language counts as a failed beat; replace euphemism with the exact bodily, social, or material consequence the character experiences.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm across dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for ritual speech, emphasis, or deliberate character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count, dialogue density, and narrative movement aggressively: follow ordeal with meal, revelation with labor, schism with care, and public spectacle with close-bodied aftermath so no adjacent chapters share the same structural rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, bodily, locally sacred, and unsanitized; lyrical only when pressure earns it, never as a decorative default.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person rotating among the five siblings; each scene stays inside one consciousness and lets the river press through perception rather than omniscient explanation.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate muscular propulsion with denser lyric accumulation; peak scenes should tighten and clarify rather than dissolve into fragmentary haze.
